title: 1000Pcs Champagne Rose Petals Artificial Rose Flowers Non-Woven Fake Flower Petals for Wedding, Party Decoration
features: Material: Artificial Rose Flowers are made of non-woven fabric, soft texture, reusable, not easy to fade, and have a realistic and beautiful appearance.
Easy to Use: When using, rub it with your fingers, and then the fake rose petals will spread out. You can sprinkle them on the aisle, floor, bed, etc.
Widely Used: Emulation Rose Petals can be used for weddings, marriage proposals, celebrations, anniversaries, romantic nights, birthdays, surprise parties, etc.
What You Get: The package includes 1000pcs champagne rose petals. The size is about 4.5x5cm. These Artificial Flower Petals can add a romantic and warm atmosphere to your event.
After-sales service: If you have any questions after receiving the products, please contact us as soon as possible. We will try our best to solve the problem for you.
